case_title: UNIVERSITY OF COLORADO-BOULDER vs. MONSALUD, DOUGLAS J.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF COLORADO-BOULDER AS TO DEFENDANT MONSALUD, DOUGLAS J.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF COLORADO-BOULDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONSALUD, DOUGLAS J. $2,679.98 PRINCIPAL, $177.59 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,937.57 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
